checks.description: flag output must be high‑impedance for non‑SLT/SLTU opcodes and asserted (1) for SLT or SLTU
checks.pass_condition: If aluc equals SLT (6'b101010) or SLTU (6'b101011) then flag == 1'b1; otherwise flag == 1'bz
checks.trigger_condition: When the edge_001 stimulus drives a concrete aluc value

checks.pass_condition: For the driven inputs a, b, and aluc, the output r must equal the arithmetic/logic result defined by the opcode; zero must be 1 when r == 32'b0 else 0; carry, negative, and overflow must reflect the corresponding condition of the operation; flag must be 1 for SLT/SLTU and high‑impedance otherwise.
checks.trigger_condition: When the basic_001 stimulus applies a legal input combination
